1.description: Fetch Trondheim municipality geometry to filter other datasets

2.description: Fetch high-risk quick-clay hazard areas (skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = 'Høy') within Trondheim

4.description: Join buildings with quick-clay hazard areas (intersects)

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.

Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.

args.sql: SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson, kommunenummer, kommunenavn FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim';

SELECT ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson, kommunenummer, kommunenavn FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Trondheim';

1.description: Fetch Trondheim municipality geometry and kommunenummer using exact kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch high-risk quick-clay hazard areas filtered by Trondheim kommunenummer

3.description: Fetch buildings filtered by Trondheim kommunenummer

4.description: Join buildings with high-risk quick-clay hazard areas using intersects

candidates.database_description: Quick clay hazard zone data, including hazard classes, consequence classes, and risk classes for areas with potential large quick-clay landslides.

Building and cadastral building data from Matrikkelen, including building points (representasjonspunkt), building type, building number, current building status, municipality attributes, and identifiers for linking buildings to addresses and properties.
Cadastral parcel data from Matrikkelen, including parcel polygons, parcel identifiers, municipality attributes, parcel area, and metadata for linking parcels to cadastral property units.

Storm-surge and sea-level-rise hazard data showing coastal inundation areas for different return periods and future sea-level scenarios. Useful for coastal flood exposure analysis and scenario-based hazard assessment.
